name: Mandalay Resources Corporation
description: Mandalay Resources Corporation is a Canadian-based mining company focused on the production of gold and antimony from two wholly owned underground operations: the Costerfield gold-antimony mine in Victoria, Australia, and the Bjorkdal gold mine in Skelleftea, Sweden. Both mines are in active production, making Mandalay a cash-generating mid-tier producer with a growing resource base approaching two million gold equivalent ounces in measured and indicated resources. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
